emails.subject: Quick question about the annual report
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

I need to verify some details about our annual report file before the meeting this afternoon. Could you check the file in the /data directory and send me the file details? I want to make sure I have the latest version - specifically need to know the file size, when it was last modified, and the current permissions.

Just ping me on Slack once you have the info.

Thanks!
Bob
